summary: Verified DialBox spoken menu bug fix. Intercepted POST /api/tts after clicking lift-handset-btn and confirmed the 'text' payload now enumerates every enabled program (Fortune Caller/1, MindLine/3, Knock Knock/5, Magic 8 Dial/8), plus voicemail=star and repeat=zero. Coming-soon programs (Chat Bae, Dial 4 Adventure, Unknown Caller, Holiday Hotline, Prank Dialer) are correctly excluded. Old generic 'Press a number to get started' string is NOT present. Regression: pressing 0 re-speaks the exact same full menu; pressing 1 auto-dials and routes to Fortune Caller oracle selection (TTS 'Welcome to the Fortune Caller. Choose your oracle...' fired, ORACLE screen rendered).
captured_tts_text: Welcome to DialBox. Your direct line to fortunes, adventures, strange callers, and more. For Fortune Caller, press 1. For MindLine, press 3. For Knock Knock, press 5. For Magic 8 Dial, press 8. To check your voicemail, press star. To hear this menu again, press zero.
critical_code_review_comments: PhoneSimulator.jsx is ~890 lines; consider splitting per-line modules (Fortune/MindLine/Magic8/KnockKnock/Voicemail) into smaller hooks/components for maintainability.
The spoken-menu builder is inlined in openMenu; extracting a pure buildSpokenMenu(items, greeting) helper would make it unit-testable.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix confirmed live at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. TTS interception via page.on('request') on /api/tts is the reliable way to validate spoken content since audio can't be transcribed. Enabled programs currently: Fortune(1), MindLine(3), KnockKnock(5), Magic8(8).
